case_title: AUTO ONE ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION VS. DANIEL LYNCH et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION AND HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTO ONE ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR DEC-01-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
NOTICE RE PUNITIVE DAMAGES
DECLARATION OF RENE SANDERS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTO ONE ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLAINT [DECL OF MAILING & DECL OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO], PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTO ONE ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION SERVED OCT-12-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, DANIEL

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WAS "DENIED FOR LACK OF PROOF OF SERVICE." COUNSEL PROVIDED A PROOF OF SERVICE BUT NO DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE. THE COURT CONTINUED PLAINTIFF AUTO ONE ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION FROM DEC-01-2005 TO DEC-15-2005, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 FOR A DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN: REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR #1558

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF AUTO ONE ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION AND HEARING- GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Continued To Dec-15-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF AUTO ONE ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION'S Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing.
APPEARANCE: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. 922-5939 specially appearing for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court's tentative ruling was "denied for lack of proof of service." Counsel provided a proof of service but no declaration of diligence. The Court continued the matter to 12/15/05 for a declaration of diligence. Plaintiff to give notice. No opposition filed. (301/JLW/ju) Court Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
